To get the maximum nutritional benefits from fruits and vegetables, it is important to find ways to eat more servings of vegetables and fruits per day. 43 /c161
/c161Eat as much of other vegetables as possible daily. /c161Eat vegetables/ fruits in all your meals in various forms (curry, soups, mixed with curd, added to pulse preparations and rice). /c161Consume raw and fresh vegetables as salads. /c161Grow the family's requirements of vegetables in the kitchen garden if possible. /c161Green leafy vegetables, when properly cleaned and cooked are safe even for infants. /c161Let different varieties of vegetables and fruits add color to your plate
